evidence.notes: Screenshots were supplied by the vehicle/unit owner in prior conversations. The owner confirmed on 2026-07-12 that the extracted menu structure is accurate and requires no re-capture for evidence acceptance.

notes: Captured visible structure: main/diagnose contained pml and settings; settings contained AMI/AUX, Microphones, Displays, Tel settings and HDD Nav DB. No coding/carmenuoperation/cardevicelist/car_function_list entries were visible in that captured state. This confirms visibility only, not functional availability.
